name: Vermicelli with Ricotta Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Tbsp Imported Parmesan cheese - freshly grated
2 Tbsp Chives, snipped OR 2 Tbsp Top part of green scallion
1/4 cup Italian parsley leaves, well packed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, place the ricotta cheese, milk, Parmesan cheese, lemon rind, nutmeg, snipped chives, parsley, salt, and pepper. Process until chives are finely minced and the ricotta has the texture of lightly whipped cream, about 45 seconds.
2. Cook the pasta in 6 quarts boiling water with 2 tsp coarse salt (optional) until al dente. Drain the pasta and return it to the pot in which it was boiled.
3. Quickly toss the pasta with the cream sauce. Transfer to 4 pasta bowls.
4. Garnish each serving with 1/2 tsp parsley and serve.
